commit.subject: LU-6142 llite: remove lli_readdir_mutex
commit.message:
LU-6142 llite: remove lli_readdir_mutex

This mutex is initialized but never used, so
remove it.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Mr NeilBrown <neilb@suse.com>
